reviews.comment:
La carga de combustible es engorrosa, por lo general hay dos cuadras de cola, los muchachos son atentos pero se toman su tiempo... No agilizan, no limpian vidrios, no preguntan por aceite o agua, no anda la promoción de YPF Serviclub y por lo general NO te cargan los puntos... En el full es otro mundo, funciona bien, los chicos son atentos y siempre preguntan si sos socio y te piden la Serviclub. Creo que con muy poco podrían mejorar mucho.

(Translated by Google)
Refueling is a hassle; there's usually a two-block line. The guys are attentive, but they take their time. They don't speed things up, they don't clean the windshield, they don't ask about oil or water, the YPF Serviclub promotion doesn't work, and they generally don't credit your points. At the full station, it's a different story. It works well; the guys are attentive and always ask if you're a member and ask for your Serviclub card. I think they could improve a lot with very little effort.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNReTUtRTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Pero no les dura el combustible.. llega el camión y la gente se agolpa a cargar hasta que se agota.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. But they don't have enough fuel. The truck arrives and people crowd around to fill up until it runs out.
